node.statement: SUBROUTINE 2G — Projector Block Encoding: Construct a (1,1,0)-block encoding of Pi_C, the projector onto the non-zero subspace of C (Lemma 24). Uses a reversible classical computation U prime that checks whether all 8 cubes surrounding node i have nu Sigma_f = 0. Gate cost: O(z poly(log 1/h)).
